title: SourceInput
description: Merged configuration schema with all source types and common definitions

AssetType.description: Type of the asset or source

SourceCategory.description: Category of the source: TABULAR for structured databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL, MSSQL, Oracle, Hive, Databricks Unity Catalog, Snowflake), UNSTRUCTURED for text/web/document sources (WordPress, S3-Compatible Storage, Azure Blob Storage, Google Cloud Storage, Slack, MongoDB, PowerBI, Tableau, Confluence, Jira, Service Desk)

DetectorType.description: Type of detector for content analysis

SamplingStrategy.description: Sampling strategy: RANDOM samples items randomly, LATEST prioritises the most recently modified/created items, ALL scans every item with no limit

SamplingConfig.title: SamplingConfig
SamplingConfig.description: Controls how content is extracted from each source. For tabular sources rows_per_page controls both sample size for RANDOM/LATEST and pagination batch size for ALL.

fetch_all_until_first_success.description: When true, force strategy ALL until this source gets its first successful run. After the first successful run, use the configured strategy.

order_by_column.description: Column to use for LATEST sampling mode in tabular sources (usually created_at/updated_at). Auto-detected when not set.

fallback_to_random.description: Tabular sources only. Fallback to RANDOM ordering when LATEST mode cannot resolve an ordering column.

include_column_names.description: Tabular sources only. Include column names in sampled detector payload rows.

rows_per_page.description: Tabular sources only. Number of rows per sample (RANDOM/LATEST) or per pagination batch (ALL). Controls memory usage during large table scans.

Detectors.description: Detectors to run on ingested content

CustomDetectorSelections.description: Reusable custom detector IDs selected from the custom detector catalog.

url.description: Base URL of the WordPress site (e.g., https://example.com)

username.description: Username for authentication (optional for public content)

WordPressOptionalContent.title: WordPressOptionalContent
WordPressOptionalContent.description: Content scope and filters for WordPress ingestion.

post_status.description: Post status filters (requires authentication for non-public statuses)

workspace.description: Slack workspace name or domain (for display and stable IDs)

channel_types.description: Slack conversation types to include when listing channels

channel_ids.description: Explicit channel IDs to scan. If provided, channel_types is ignored.

SlackOptionalTimeRange.title: SlackOptionalTimeRange
SlackOptionalTimeRange.description: Time window filters for message ingestion.

oldest.description: Start of date range (Slack timestamp or ISO 8601)

latest.description: End of date range (Slack timestamp or ISO 8601)

SlackOptionalIngestion.title: SlackOptionalIngestion
SlackOptionalIngestion.description: Throughput and payload controls for Slack ingestion.

rate_limit_delay_seconds.description: Delay between API calls to avoid rate limits

include_thread_replies.description: Include thread replies in fetched content for detectors

prefix.description: Object key prefix filter (for example, exports/2026/)

include_empty_objects.description: Include zero-byte objects in extraction results

include_object_metadata.description: Attach provider metadata (etag, size, content-type hints, timestamps) to asset checksums

include_content_preview.description: Download object bytes to infer MIME and extract detector-ready text previews

bucket.description: Bucket name for AWS S3, MinIO, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, Garage, and other S3-compatible endpoints

S3CompatibleStorageMasked.title: S3CompatibleStorageMasked
S3CompatibleStorageMasked.description: Optional static credentials. Leave empty to use ambient AWS credentials chain.

aws_session_token.description: Optional session token for temporary credentials

region_name.description: Region (recommended for AWS; required by some S3-compatible providers)

endpoint_url.description: Custom endpoint URL for MinIO/R2/B2/Garage and other S3-compatible providers

request_timeout_seconds.description: Network timeout in seconds for list/download operations

max_keys_per_page.description: Maximum objects requested per provider list API call

max_object_bytes.description: Maximum bytes downloaded per object for MIME detection and text extraction

account_url.description: Azure Blob account URL (for example, https://<account>.blob.core.windows.net)

AzureBlobStorageMasked.title: AzureBlobStorageMasked
AzureBlobStorageMasked.description: Optional Azure credentials. Leave empty to use managed identity/default credential chain.

azure_connection_string.description: Azure storage connection string (takes precedence over other auth fields)

azure_client_id.description: Azure Entra client ID (service principal auth)

azure_client_secret.description: Azure Entra client secret (service principal auth)

azure_tenant_id.description: Azure Entra tenant ID (service principal auth)

request_timeout_seconds.description: Network timeout in seconds for list/download operations

max_keys_per_page.description: Maximum blobs requested per list page

max_object_bytes.description: Maximum bytes downloaded per blob for MIME detection and text extraction

GoogleCloudStorageMasked.title: GoogleCloudStorageMasked
GoogleCloudStorageMasked.description: Optional inline service account credentials JSON. Leave empty to use ADC/workload identity.

gcp_credentials_json.description: Google service account credentials JSON as inline string

project_id.description: Optional GCP project ID override for auth context and bucket listing

gcp_credentials_file.description: Path to Google service account JSON credentials file

request_timeout_seconds.description: Network timeout in seconds for list/download operations

max_keys_per_page.description: Maximum objects requested per list page

max_object_bytes.description: Maximum bytes downloaded per object for MIME detection and text extraction

PostgreSQLOptionalScope.title: PostgreSQLOptionalScope
PostgreSQLOptionalScope.description: Database, schema, and table selection scope.

database.description: Single database to scan (optional when include_all_databases is true)

include_all_databases.description: Scan all non-template databases visible to this user

maintenance_database.description: Database used for database enumeration when include_all_databases is true

include_tables.description: Optional table allowlist. Accepted forms: schema.table or database.schema.table

table_limit.description: Optional cap on number of table assets extracted

MySQLSSLMode.description: SSL/TLS connection mode. DISABLED: no TLS; PREFERRED: TLS when available (default); REQUIRED: mandate TLS without certificate verification; VERIFY_CA: mandate TLS and verify the CA certificate (requires ssl_ca); VERIFY_IDENTITY: mandate TLS, verify CA, and verify server hostname.

ssl_ca.description: PEM-encoded CA certificate for SSL/TLS verification. Paste the full certificate content (-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE----- ... -----END CERTIFICATE-----). Required when ssl_mode is VERIFY_CA or VERIFY_IDENTITY.

allow_public_key_retrieval.description: Allow automatic RSA public key retrieval from the server for caching_sha2_password authentication (MySQL 8+). Only needed when not using SSL and connecting to MySQL 8 servers using the default authentication plugin.

database.description: Single database to scan (optional when include_all_databases is true)

include_all_databases.description: Scan all visible databases except excluded system databases

include_tables.description: Optional table allowlist. Accepted forms: table or database.table

table_limit.description: Optional cap on number of table assets extracted per database

auth_mode.description: Authentication mode. CUSTOM uses masked.username as-is, LDAP prefixes username with ldap_domain when provided.

ldap_domain.description: Optional LDAP/AD domain for LDAP auth mode (for example, CORP or corp.local).

is_aws_rds.description: Set true for AWS RDS SQL Server, false for on-prem. If unset, runtime auto-detects using host patterns.

MSSQLOptionalExtraction.title: MSSQLOptionalExtraction
MSSQLOptionalExtraction.description: Lineage and advanced metadata extraction controls for SQL Server.

include_table_lineage.description: Include table-level lineage links using foreign key metadata.

include_view_lineage.description: Include view-to-table/view lineage links using SQL Server dependency metadata.

include_view_column_lineage.description: Enable view column lineage extraction when available.

include_stored_procedures_code.description: Include stored procedure source code metadata when available.

include_jobs.description: Include SQL Server Agent jobs metadata extraction.

include_query_lineage.description: Enable query-based lineage extraction from Query Store/DMVs.

max_queries_to_extract.description: Maximum number of queries to analyze for query-based lineage.

min_query_calls.description: Minimum execution count for queries to be included in query-based lineage.

query_exclude_patterns.description: SQL LIKE patterns used to exclude queries from query-based lineage.

include_usage_statistics.description: Enable usage statistics extraction from SQL query metadata.

MSSQLOptionalScope.title: MSSQLOptionalScope
MSSQLOptionalScope.description: Database, schema, and object selection scope.

database.description: Single database to scan (optional when include_all_databases is true)

include_all_databases.description: Scan all visible databases except excluded system databases

include_objects.description: Optional object allowlist. Accepted forms: schema.object or database.schema.object

table_limit.description: Optional cap on number of table/view assets extracted

OracleOptionalScope.title: OracleOptionalScope
OracleOptionalScope.description: Schema, object, and lineage extraction scope.

include_view_lineage.description: Extract coarse lineage links from views to referenced tables/views

include_view_column_lineage.description: Enable view column lineage collection from Oracle dependency metadata

include_objects.description: Optional object allowlist. Accepted forms: schema.object or service.schema.object

table_limit.description: Optional cap on number of table/view assets extracted

HiveOptionalConnection.title: HiveOptionalConnection
HiveOptionalConnection.description: Hive connection transport and authentication options.

connect_args.description: Additional PyHive connection arguments (e.g. auth, kerberos_service_name, http_path).

HiveOptionalScope.title: HiveOptionalScope
HiveOptionalScope.description: Hive database and object selection scope.

database.description: Single Hive database to scan (optional when include_all_databases is true)

include_all_databases.description: Scan all visible Hive databases except excluded system databases

include_objects.description: Optional object allowlist. Accepted forms: table or database.table

table_limit.description: Optional cap on number of table/view assets extracted per database

warehouse_id.description: Databricks SQL warehouse ID used for sampling queries
Databricks SQL warehouse ID used for sampling queries

DatabricksOptionalConnection.title: DatabricksOptionalConnection
DatabricksOptionalConnection.description: Databricks API and SQL statement execution tuning options.

timeout_seconds.description: HTTP timeout for Databricks API calls

statement_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum wait timeout for SQL statement execution

max_statement_polls.description: Maximum polling attempts when waiting for SQL statement completion

include_schemas.description: Optional schema allowlist. Accepted forms: schema or catalog.schema

exclude_schemas.description: Schema denylist. Accepted forms: schema or catalog.schema

include_tables.description: Optional table allowlist. Accepted forms: table, schema.table, or catalog.schema.table

table_limit_per_schema.description: Optional cap on number of Unity Catalog tables extracted per schema

DatabricksOptionalExtraction.title: DatabricksOptionalExtraction
DatabricksOptionalExtraction.description: Databricks Unity Catalog extraction feature flags.

include_table_lineage.description: Include table-level lineage links between Unity Catalog tables

include_column_lineage.description: Attempt to fetch column-level lineage metadata

include_notebooks.description: Extract workspace notebook metadata as additional assets

include_pipelines.description: Extract Delta Live Tables pipeline metadata as additional assets

account_id.description: Snowflake account identifier (for example, xy12345.us-east-2.aws or LMAUONV-ONE_DATA_DEV)
Snowflake account identifier (for example, xy12345.us-east-2.aws or LMAUONV-ONE_DATA_DEV)
Snowflake account identifier (for example, xy12345.us-east-2.aws or LMAUONV-ONE_DATA_DEV)
Snowflake account identifier (for example, xy12345.us-east-2.aws or LMAUONV-ONE_DATA_DEV)

private_key.description: Snowflake private key PEM content. You can pass escaped newlines (\n).

private_key_password.description: Password for encrypted private key PEM (optional when key is not encrypted).

token.description: OAuth bearer token for Snowflake authentication

SnowflakeOptionalConnection.title: SnowflakeOptionalConnection
SnowflakeOptionalConnection.description: Snowflake connection and session tuning options.

warehouse.description: Snowflake warehouse to use for metadata and sampling queries

role.description: Snowflake role to use for metadata and sampling queries

snowflake_domain.description: Snowflake domain suffix (use snowflakecomputing.cn for China regions).

SnowflakeOptionalScope.title: SnowflakeOptionalScope
SnowflakeOptionalScope.description: Database, schema, and object selection scope.

database.description: Single database to scan (optional when include_all_databases is true)

include_all_databases.description: Scan all visible databases except excluded system databases

include_objects.description: Optional object allowlist. Accepted forms: schema.object or database.schema.object

table_limit.description: Optional cap on number of table/view assets extracted

SnowflakeOptionalExtraction.title: SnowflakeOptionalExtraction
SnowflakeOptionalExtraction.description: Lineage extraction controls for Snowflake metadata ingestion.

include_table_lineage.description: Include table-level lineage links when dependency metadata is accessible.

include_view_lineage.description: Include view-to-table/view lineage links when dependency metadata is accessible.

cluster_host.description: Atlas SRV cluster host or full mongodb+srv:// URI (for example, cluster.abc123.mongodb.net or mongodb+srv://cluster.abc123.mongodb.net). If a full URI is supplied, the host is extracted and credentials are discarded — set them in masked fields instead.

MongoDBMaskedNone.title: MongoDBMaskedNone
MongoDBMaskedNone.description: Use when the MongoDB endpoint allows anonymous/no-auth access.

MongoDBOptionalConnection.title: MongoDBOptionalConnection
MongoDBOptionalConnection.description: MongoDB connection and authentication tuning options.

app_name.description: MongoDB appName (Atlas and driver telemetry label)

tls.description: Enable TLS for on-prem connections when required

replica_set.description: Replica set name for on-prem deployments

direct_connection.description: Connect directly to a single host instead of topology discovery

MongoDBOptionalScope.title: MongoDBOptionalScope
MongoDBOptionalScope.description: MongoDB database and collection selection scope.

database.description: Single database to scan (optional when include_all_databases is true)

include_all_databases.description: Scan all visible databases except excluded system databases

include_collections.description: Optional collection allowlist. Accepted forms: collection or database.collection

exclude_collections.description: Optional collection denylist. Accepted forms: collection or database.collection

collection_limit.description: Optional cap on number of collections extracted per database

client_secret.description: Azure app client secret for service principal auth

access_token.description: Bearer token for PowerBI API access

PowerBIOptionalConnection.title: PowerBIOptionalConnection
PowerBIOptionalConnection.description: PowerBI API endpoint and timeout controls.

authority_url.description: Authority base URL for Microsoft Entra token issuance

timeout_seconds.description: HTTP timeout for PowerBI API calls

PowerBIOptionalScope.title: PowerBIOptionalScope
PowerBIOptionalScope.description: Workspace scope controls for PowerBI ingestion.

workspace_ids.description: Optional allowlist of workspace IDs to scan

workspace_names.description: Optional allowlist of workspace names to scan

PowerBIOptionalExtraction.title: PowerBIOptionalExtraction
PowerBIOptionalExtraction.description: Feature flags that control PowerBI entities to extract.

extract_workspaces_to_containers.description: Emit workspace metadata suitable for container grouping

extract_datasets_to_containers.description: Emit dataset metadata suitable for container grouping

extract_dataset_schema.description: Attempt to extract PowerBI dataset table schema metadata

site.description: Tableau site content URL. Use empty string for the Default site on Tableau Server.
Tableau site content URL. Use empty string for the Default site on Tableau Server.

TableauOptionalConnection.title: TableauOptionalConnection
TableauOptionalConnection.description: Tableau API connection and retry settings.

max_retries.description: Maximum retries for transient Tableau API request failures

ssl_verify.description: Verify SSL certificates. Provide a PEM bundle path string for custom certs.

session_trust_env.description: When true, allow requests session proxy/environment settings

timeout_seconds.description: HTTP timeout in seconds for Tableau requests

ingest_tags.description: Extract Tableau tags into asset metadata

ingest_owner.description: Extract Tableau owner metadata into assets

extract_usage_stats.description: Extract Tableau usage statistics when accessible

base_url.description: Confluence Cloud tenant URL (for example, https://your-domain.atlassian.net)

account_email.description: Atlassian account email used with API token for Basic authentication

api_token.description: Atlassian API token for Confluence Cloud

ConfluenceOptionalConnection.title: ConfluenceOptionalConnection
ConfluenceOptionalConnection.description: HTTP and retry settings for Confluence API calls.

request_timeout_seconds.description: HTTP request timeout for Confluence API calls

rate_limit_delay_seconds.description: Additional delay between API requests to reduce rate-limit pressure

max_retries.description: Maximum retry attempts for transient API failures and rate limits

ConfluenceOptionalScopeSpaces.title: ConfluenceOptionalScopeSpaces
ConfluenceOptionalScopeSpaces.description: Space-level filters passed to Confluence /spaces endpoint.

labels.description: Filter spaces by labels (comma-separated in API request)

include_footer_comments.description: Include footer comments and aggregate them into a per-page comments asset

include_inline_comments.description: Include inline comments and aggregate them into a per-page comments asset

include_attachments.description: Include Confluence page attachments as related assets

include_linked_file_assets.description: Materialize linked file-like URLs from page body as related assets

attachment_max_bytes.description: Maximum bytes downloaded per attachment for MIME inference and text extraction

base_url.description: Jira Cloud tenant URL (for example, https://your-domain.atlassian.net)

account_email.description: Atlassian account email used with API token for Basic authentication

api_token.description: Atlassian API token for Jira Cloud

JiraOptionalConnection.title: JiraOptionalConnection
JiraOptionalConnection.description: HTTP and retry settings for Jira API calls.

request_timeout_seconds.description: HTTP request timeout for Jira API calls

rate_limit_delay_seconds.description: Additional delay between API requests to reduce rate-limit pressure

max_retries.description: Maximum retry attempts for transient API failures and rate limits

JiraOptionalScope.title: JiraOptionalScope
JiraOptionalScope.description: Optional Jira scope filters. When omitted, all visible issues are eligible for sampling.

jql.description: Additional JQL filter to combine with project scope

include_comments.description: Include issue comments and aggregate them into a per-issue comments asset

include_attachments.description: Include issue attachments as related assets

attachment_max_bytes.description: Maximum bytes downloaded per attachment for MIME inference and text extraction

base_url.description: Jira Service Management tenant URL (for example, https://your-domain.atlassian.net)

account_email.description: Atlassian account email used with API token for Basic authentication

api_token.description: Atlassian API token for Jira Service Management Cloud

ServiceDeskOptionalConnection.title: ServiceDeskOptionalConnection
ServiceDeskOptionalConnection.description: HTTP and retry settings for Jira Service Management API calls.

request_timeout_seconds.description: HTTP request timeout for Service Desk API calls

rate_limit_delay_seconds.description: Additional delay between API requests to reduce rate-limit pressure

max_retries.description: Maximum retry attempts for transient API failures and rate limits

ServiceDeskOptionalScope.title: ServiceDeskOptionalScope
ServiceDeskOptionalScope.description: Optional Service Desk scope filters. When omitted, all visible requests are eligible for sampling.

request_status.description: Request status filter passed to Service Desk API

request_ownership.description: Ownership filter values passed to Service Desk API (for example, OWNED_REQUESTS)

organization_id.description: Organization ID used to scope requests

search_term.description: Search term filter for request summaries and content

include_comments.description: Include request comments and aggregate them into a per-request comments asset

include_attachments.description: Include request attachments as related assets

attachment_max_bytes.description: Maximum bytes downloaded per attachment for MIME inference and text extraction
